backend/main.mo: Main actor for the AI recruitment platform, defining domain types (jobs, candidates, interviews, offers) and CRUD/query endpoints with role-based access control via a prefab authorization mixin.
backend/migration.mo: Data migration module that upgrades the actor state by adding `candidateName` and `jobTitle` fields to the `Interview` type, copying all other state unchanged.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no recorded features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON file containing short summaries of the Offers page and OfferForm component for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes including colors, radius, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point titled 'AI Recruit Pro' that mounts the React app at the `#root` div via `src/main.tsx`.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes, handles Internet Identity authentication gating, and renders a profile setup modal for new users.
frontend/src/components/AIScoreBadge.tsx: Reusable badge component that displays an AI match score percentage with color-coded styling and an optional progress bar based on score thresholds.
Slide-in panel component that shows detailed candidate information including contact info, skills, match scores, pipeline history, and scheduled interviews.
frontend/src/components/CandidateForm.ts: A slide-out Sheet form component for creating or editing a candidate, with fields for name, email, phone, resume, skills, and experience years, plus AI-powered resume parsing via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/ChatbotWidget.ts: A floating chatbot widget that answers FAQ questions about the hiring process using keyword-based intent matching and can fetch live job listings from the backend.
frontend/src/components/InterviewForm.ts: A Dialog form component for scheduling or editing an interview, capturing candidate, job, date/time, interviewer, type, status, and notes fields with create/update mutations.
frontend/src/components/JobForm.tsx: A slide-out Sheet form component for creating or editing a job requisition, with fields for title, department, location, job type, description, required skills, and experience level.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: The main application shell providing a responsive sidebar navigation with links to all major pages, user profile display, logout functionality, and an embedded ChatbotWidget.
frontend/src/components/OfferForm.tsx: A dialog form component for creating offer letters and viewing/updating their status (pending, accepted, declined), using React state and custom query hooks for mutations and data fetching.
frontend/src/components/TemplateForm.tsx: A dialog form component for creating and editing communication templates, supporting placeholder insertion, a live preview tab with sample data substitution, and category selection.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, initializing access control with an admin token and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flows, identity persistence, and delegation validity checks.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for interacting with the ICP backend, covering user profiles, roles, analytics, jobs, candidates, interviews, templates, and offer letters.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including color tokens, sidebar variables, and utility classes like gradients and glassmorphism.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a single `cn` utility function that merges Tailwind CSS class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/Analytics.tsx: Displays recruitment analytics dashboard with summary metric cards and Recharts visualizations (bar, pie, line charts) for applications over time, stage distribution, and top jobs by volume.
frontend/src/pages/Candidates.tsx: Renders a searchable, filterable candidate list with CRUD operations, AI match score calculation, and a detail/form panel for viewing or editing individual candidates.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page showing key recruitment metrics, a pipeline stage bar chart, and a top-scoring candidates table, with navigation shortcuts to other sections.
frontend/src/pages/Interviews.tsx: Manages interview scheduling with list and calendar views, aggregating interviews across all candidates and supporting status updates and form-based creation/editing.
frontend/src/pages/Jobs.tsx: Displays job requisitions with search, status, and department filters, and supports creating, editing, updating status, and deleting jobs via a form and confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/pages/Offers.tsx: React page for managing offer letters, displaying all candidates' offers with status badges, and supporting create/delete operations via a form dialog and confirmation alert.
frontend/src/pages/Pipeline.tsx: Kanban-style recruitment pipeline page that displays candidates grouped by hiring stage, supporting drag-and-drop stage transitions, job filtering, and a move-with-note dialog.
frontend/src/pages/Templates.tsx: Page for managing communication templates with search/category filtering, and create/edit/delete functionality backed by query hooks and a form dialog.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, persist them in sessionStorage, and clean sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based color palettes (teal, amber, slate), typography/container-query plugins, and custom shadows and border radii.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state (version 5) for an AI-powered recruitment management platform, listing existing features, architectural notes, and requirement mappings for all major modules including Dashboard, Jobs, Candidates, Pipeline, Interviews, Analytics, and Settings.
